portfolio_rationale: LLY tops the ranking on exceptional fundamental growth (37.6% revenue, 84% gross margin) combined with solid technicals, making it the highest-conviction pick despite leverage risk. AAPL earns the second slot with the strongest technical momentum in the group (RSI 64, volume 2.9x, 9% 20d return) backed by robust fundamentals. XOM gets meaningful weight for its uniquely clean technical picture (all 7 bullish factors, zero bearish) plus positive news sentiment. GOOGL is excluded due to extreme overbought conditions (RSI 90.6) creating high mean-reversion risk, and BRK.B is excluded due to negative revenue growth and weak technicals.

LLY.reason: Best fundamental growth story (37.6% revenue growth, 84% gross margin, 43% operating margin) with solid technicals and judge confidence of 0.85.

AAPL.reason: Strongest technical momentum in the universe (RSI 64, volume 2.9x average, all MAs aligned) backed by strong profitability metrics and positive FCF.

XOM.reason: Cleanest technical setup with all 7 bullish factors and zero bearish, plus positive news sentiment and majority-positive article flow differentiating it from peers.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamentals and mostly bullish technicals but MACD below signal line indicates genuinely weakening momentum, warranting reduced weight versus top picks.

GOOGL.reason: RSI at 90.6 signals extreme overbought conditions with 27% already gained in 20 days; mean-reversion risk dominates despite strong underlying fundamentals.

BRK.B.reason: Weakest bull case with negative revenue growth, price below 20-day MA, MACD below signal, and judge confidence of only 0.65; minimal allocation reflects low conviction.
